scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @fool/core && npm run build --workspace @fool/collectors && npm run build --workspace @fool/restorers && npm run build --workspace @fool/cli && npm run build --workspace @fool/api && npm run build --workspace @fool/web
scripts.build:server: npm run build --workspace @fool/core && npm run build --workspace @fool/collectors && npm run build --workspace @fool/restorers && npm run build --workspace @fool/api
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:server && npm run start --workspace @fool/api
